assertion_results.text: Step 2.1.1 detects that the Forward Pointer section is missing from the matrix file

assertion_results.text: Step 2.1.1 auto-repairs by appending the Forward Pointer section with content None — this is a safe fix that does not require user confirmation

assertion_results.text: Step 2.1.1 logs the auto-repair action including the matrix file path

assertion_results.text: The validation result is Repaired (not Warning) — the triage proceeds without prompting the user since only auto-fixable issues were found
